events.core_change: The protagonist joins Remilia's foretold entrance without surrendering the right to choose why they arrived or what they believe.
Remilia uses status-sensitive mist paths to prevent collisions and revises ceremony when it stops serving the people inside it.

events.title_en: Do Not Laugh at the Wrong Thing
events.core_change: The protagonist returns the floor after a lazy public joke so Remilia can repair her own dignity without denial, flattery, or infantilization.

events.title_en: The Fate She Does Not Announce
events.core_change: An altered mansion plan reveals chosen protection while Remilia refuses public credit and accepts a boundary against unilateral care.
Remilia destroys the Archive's proof of inevitable meetings so uncertainty, consent, and her own theatrical declarations can remain capable of failure.
Remilia offers midnight tea and a fallible romantic declaration with friendship, romance, postponement, uncertainty, and explicit refusal all preserved as complete futures.
